ayahs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammad wa 'ala aali Muhammad
ayahs.translation: Oh Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad

ayahs.arabic: كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kamaa salyta 'ala Ibraheem wa 'ala aali Ibraheem
ayahs.translation: As You sent prayers upon Ibrahim and upon the family of Ibrahim
Indeed You are praiseworthy, Most glorious

ayahs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِك عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wa baarik 'alaa Muhammad wa 'alaa aali Muhammad
ayahs.translation: And send Your blessings upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad

ayahs.arabic: كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kamaa baarakta 'alaa Ibraheem wa 'alaa aali Ibraheem
ayahs.translation: As You sent blessings upon Ibrahim and upon the family of Ibrahim
Indeed You are praiseworthy, Most glorious
